headline: Trump YEETS Vance 😵‍💫 into Iran PEACE 🤝 MINEFIELD 💣🇮🇷
text:
POTUS Donnie T 🍊👑 SLAMMED VP JD Vance 🧔‍♂️🇺🇸 with his TOUGHEST MISSION YET 🚀💥 at White House Easter BUNNY 🐰🍳 lunch – 'If Iran 🤏☢️ deal BOMBS 💣, I BLAME VANCE 😂, if it SLAYS 🔪, I TAKE ALL CREDIT 🏆!' Laughs erupted 👏😆 from Rubio 🕶️🔥, Hegseth 🪖💪, and MAGA crew as Vance jets to PAKISTAN 🕌✈️ for HIGH-STAKES 🤝 Iran peace talks – balancing TRUMP'S MOOD SWINGS 😵‍💫🌪️, salty Tehran ayatollahs 🕌😡 gripping Strait of Hormuz 🚢🔒, ISRAELI hawks 🦅⚔️ eyeing ceasefire side-eye 👀, and EURO simps 🤡🇪🇺 dragging feet on strait reopening 🚫🌊!

Vance, ex-Marine 🪖🇮🇶 turned 'Hillbilly Elegy' 🥃📖 bro, HATES forever wars 💔🔥 – whispered DOUBTS 😬 to Trump pre-Iran BOMBS 💣 late Feb, but now gotta SQUARE UP 🥊 his 'America First' restraint vibes 😤 with Donnie's 'NUKE CIVILIZATION' Truth Social RANTS 📱💀! MAGA base 👷‍♂️🦅 watching like HAWKS 🦅🔍 – 'No foreign entanglements, bro!' as Vance eyes 2028 PREZ RUN 🏛️🚀. Can he make EVERYONE CUMMINGS 💦🤝 – Trump, mullahs, Bibi, Euros? Or just KEEPS ceasefire TRUCE 🛑 alive without SCUTTLING it 🚀💥?

White House TEA ☕: Vance teams with Kushner 🕶️💼 (Ukraine/Gaza/Iran SLAYER 🗡️), Witkoff 🧠, for Islamabad showdown 🥊🇵🇰. JD lowballs: 'Open hand 🤝 if Iran plays NICE 😇, but DON'T PLAY US 😠!' Trump wishes LUCK 🍀: 'Good team, we'll SEE 👀.' Donnie's VOLATILE STYLE 😜 – 36hr ULTIMATUM ⏰💣, 'CIVILIZATION DIES' POSTS 📱☠️, then CEASEFIRE MIRACLE 🙏 just before WW3 🚀!

Euro diplo SPILLS ☕: 'Vance DISTANCING from Iran mess 😩 – not in his PLAYBOOK 📖❌!' But JD's TRUMP LOYALIST 🐶 – MUNICH MIC DROP 🎤🇩🇪 blasting EU immig/free speech WOKES 🤡, ZELENSKY SHOUTDOWN 🗣️💥 in Oval, ORBÁN REELECT HYPE 🇭🇺🔥! 'Perfect surrogate 🦸‍♂️ for Donnie's GOALS 🎯,' says Bednar 🧠. Still, Vance's ANTI-WAR OP-EDS 📰🚫 clash with Hegseth's WAR HYPE 📣 – called ceasefire 'FRAGILE TRUCE' 😬 unlike Trump's VICTORY LAP 🏁!

Israel bro Orion 🪖🇮🇱: 'Vance signals SERIOUS PEACE 🕊️!' But tech HURDLES 🛠️ – NUCLEAR SCRAP 🔬☢️, Hormuz UNLOCK 🚢🔓 – Kushner/Witkoff pros 🏆, but who's BENCH DEPTH? 🏀 Vance, 41yo NEWBIE 🌱 to diplo deep end 🏊‍♂️💦, gotta TUNE OUT DC CHATTER 🗣️🚫, play ATTACK DOG 🐕‍🦺 when needed 🦈, NAVIGATE minefield 🕸️ without BLOWING his 2028 SHOT 🎯! Rathke warns: 'Trump might FLIP 😵‍💫, BLAME VANCE 🥴!' Donnie threw him IN – sink or SWIM? 🏊‍♂️🌊 High drama, bros ‼️🍿🇺🇸
